name: clara-kai-clara-maren-regression
description: Regression check for Clara routing to Kai, returning to Clara, and then routing to Maren without getting stuck or speaking as the wrong agent.

userTurns.label: Vacation planning scenario
userTurns.text: A technician wants vacation next month and we need shift coverage. How would you coordinate that?

userTurns.label: Return to Clara
userTurns.text: Please send me back to Clara.

userTurns.label: Maren scheduling follow-up
userTurns.text: Maren, I need help rescheduling appointments across locations.
